name: swarmfish
description: Multi-agent swarm intelligence engine. Simulate how diverse stakeholders react to scenarios and predict outcomes using knowledge graphs, agent personas, and interactive dashboards.

default_sim_model.description: Default model for simulation agent turns (opus, sonnet, haiku)

default_report_model.description: Default model for report generation (opus, sonnet, haiku)

auto_open_dashboard.description: Automatically open dashboard in browser after generation (true/false)
